verses.text: A woman bearing a son is unclean seven days, then purifying thirty-three. After a son. Childbirth requires cleansing.
A woman bearing a son is unclean seven days, then purifying thirty-three. After a son. Childbirth requires cleansing.
A woman bearing a son is unclean seven days, then purifying thirty-three. After a son. Childbirth requires cleansing.
A woman bearing a son is unclean seven days, then purifying thirty-three. After a son. Childbirth requires cleansing.
For a daughter, the times are doubled. After a daughter. The period is longer.
She brings a lamb and a bird, or two birds if poor, for atonement. Atonement. Even new life needs a sacrifice; the poor are provided for.
